hi, i'm zoey chen!

CSE @ UC Irvine '29

I'm a developer, artist, and student. I love to find new ways to express myself — whether that's designing games, building websites, or through physical mediums.

projects

games and sites galore

Gilgamesh Destroys The World

You can't destroy the world on an empty stomach... A puzzle game made at UCI, Winter quarter 2026.

PuzzleGame JamBrowserVGDC

Rose-Tinted Vision

Woo your crush, but don't get noticed! A simulation game made collaboratively for winter game jam 2026.

SimulationGame JamVGDC

Ant Eater

Shrink inside an anthill and fight ants now on equal footing. A 2D metroidvania platformer made at UCI, Fall quarter 2025.

Platformer2DMetroidvaniaVGDC

Unforgettable Spirit

discover the mystery of your lost memories. A visual novel puzzle game made at UCI, Fall Zotjam 2025.

UnityGame JamBrowserVGDC

Portfolio Website

My personal portfolio site, built from scratch with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

Next.jsTailwind CSSTypeScript

Weather Forecast

A weather forecast app that displays current conditions and upcoming forecasts for any location. Built using the National Weather Service API and OpenStreetMap/Nominatim for geocoding.

HTMLJavaScriptCSS

Petrdex

A Pokedex-style catalog of UCI Petr stickers. Discover rare stickers, track collections, and learn about the artists behind the designs.

HTMLJavaScriptCSS
